arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “Real Madrid lack a bit of effectiveness up top”
arts.sum: Ancelotti on whether he was upset with the second half Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti spoke after the 1-0 win over Getafe, reflecting on the performance by saying, “we have put emphasis on being more solid at the back...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid quoted affordable price to appoint Xabi Alonso as Carlo Ancelotti replacement
arts.sum: In recent weeks, there has been lots of speculation about the manager’s job at Real Madrid, which could soon be vacant. Carlo Ancelotti is currently in charge, but should he end the season on a downer, it is almost certain that his second spell as head coach would be brought to a premature end. arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms two major injury blows for Real Madrid ahead of Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Real Madrid defeated Getafe on Wednesday to stay in the La Liga title race, but it did not come without sacrifice. Two important players suffered injury problems during proceedings at the Coliseum, and Carlo Ancelotti has subsequently delivered a troubling first update on the situation. As per Marca, Ancelotti told the media post-match that the […] The post Carlo Ancelotti confirms two major injury blows for Real Madrid ahead of Copa del Rey final appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid beats Getafe 1-0 in Spanish league ahead of Copa del Rey final against Barcelona
arts.sum: Real Madrid kept pace with Spanish league leader Barcelona on Wednesday with a 1-0 win at Getafe ahead of the rivals' meeting in the Copa del Rey final . Brazil forward Endrick made his first Spanish league start with the club, and Vinícius Júnior was substituted in the second half.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid extend advantage over Barcelona in goalscoring stat after Getafe win

arts.ttl: Real Madrid beats Getafe 1-0 in Spanish league ahead of Copa del Rey final against Barcelona
arts.sum: Real Madrid kept pace with Spanish league leader Barcelona on Wednesday with a 1-0 win at Getafe ahead of the rivals’ meeting in the Copa del Rey final. Arda Güler scored a first-half goal for Madrid, which moved back within four points of Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Getafe 0-1 Real Madrid: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Arda Guler proves his point in vital Los Blancos win
arts.sum: Arda Guler scores the only goal of the match as Real Madrid record a 1-0 victory over Getafe in Wednesday night's La Liga clash at Estadio Coliseum.

arts.ttl: Getafe 0–1 Real Madrid: Player Ratings As Los Blancos Cruise to Victory Without Kylian Mbappe
arts.sum: A first-half winner from Arda Güler secured all three points for Real Madrid against Getafe in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star limps out of Getafe clash with injury days before Barcelona showdown

arts.ttl: Real Madrid keep pace with Barcelona in La Liga with victory over Getafe
arts.sum: Real Madrid have kept themselves in the La Liga title race after picking up an important 1-0 victory over Getafe at the Coliseum. Carlo Ancelotti opted to make several changes to his side ahead of this weekend’s Copa del Rey final against Barcelona.
